entities.description: As a subsection of '5底板设计注意事项', this section outlines the design considerations for the base board, which is part of the hardware manual for the SOM-TL3588 industrial core board.
Refers to the base board, a key component of the hardware design discussed in this section.
Refers to the design process and considerations related to the base board, as detailed in this section.
Refers to the key points and considerations that must be taken into account during the design of the base board.
